mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ITEM_LOG (ITEM_CD, INOUT_TYPE, QTY, BEFORE_QTY, AFTER_QTY, REF_NO, EMP_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{itemCd}, #{inoutType}, #{qty}, #{beforeQty}, #{afterQty}, #{refNo}, #{empId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_CD as itemCd, ITEM_NM as itemNm, ITEM_TYPE as itemType, STOCK_QTY as stockQty, SAFE_QTY as safeQty, WH_LOCATION as whLocation FROM TB_ITEM WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY ITEM_CD

SELECT LOG_NO as logNo, ITEM_CD as itemCd, INOUT_TYPE as inoutType, QTY as qty, BEFORE_QTY as beforeQty, AFTER_QTY as afterQty, REF_NO as refNo, EMP_ID as empId, REG_DT as regDt FROM TB_ITEM_LOG ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
